headlines.title: US Oil Drillers Continue to Add Rigs
headlines.summary: The total number of active drilling rigs for oil and gas in the United States rose this week, according to new data that Baker Hughes published on Friday, bringing the total rig count in the US to 548, down 30 from this same time last year. headlines.title: US Hits Iran-Flagged Oil Tankers While Peace Talks Continue
headlines.summary: U.S. forces struck two empty Iranian-flagged oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman on Friday, escalating pressure on Tehran’s shipping network even as Washington says a potential deal to halt the war could be close. headlines.summary: Iran has seized a tanker that appears to have been carrying its own oil, highlighting just how tangled its export system has become under sanctions and blockade.
